waiting_for_host_to_start: Waiting for host to start the discussion...
explore_stories: Explore completed discussions from other participants.
home_tagline: Participate on the multispecies governance in Aquário Vasco da Gama
welcome_description: Welcome to the ZoopDAO governance assembly. Here you'll participate in discussions about proposals, share your perspectives based on your organizational role, and contribute to collective decision-making. Ready to start participating?
map_description: This is the assembly aquarium table. Here you will see all participants positioned around the table for governance discussions. The aquarium represents the center of our multispecies governance assembly.
round_indicator_description: Track the current discussion round. Each round represents a new phase in the governance assembly where participants contribute their perspectives on the proposal.
story_sheet_description: This is the discussion input bar. Here, you can type your message to the assembly, send it, and view the chat history of all participants' contributions to the governance discussion.
player_badge_description: This is your participant badge, positioned at the bottom of the aquarium. Here you can see your message to the assembly and your current participation status.
dice_description: This is the digital clock showing the current local time (hours, minutes, seconds). It helps you track the timing of the governance assembly discussions.
instructions_description: Need help? Open the full assembly instructions for how to participate in the discussion.
human_description: Write a story from a human perspective, sharing experiences through human emotions, knowledge, and understanding of the world.
non_human_description: Write a unique story from a non-human viewpoint, imagining how a different species or natural element perceives the world around them.
role_description_placeholder: How long are you at the organization? How do you describe your responsibilities?
character_child_description: Write the story from the perspective of a child. Are you local or foreigner? How old are you? Bring your character to life!
character_child_secondary: How does being a child change your experience? Your adventure?
character_different-needs_description: Write the story from the perspective of someone with different needs.
character_different-needs_secondary: What do you like about the journey? What challenges do you have to face? What needs to change?
character_local-specialist_description: Write the story from the perspective of local worker, or tour guide, or other local specialist.
character_local-specialist_secondary: What makes this place so special to you? How are you connected to the local people and their history?
character_nature-lover_description: Write the story from the perspective of a nature lover or activist. What is your passion? What brought you to Madeira?
character_nature-lover_secondary: See things from a conservationist point of view. How would you protect this nature from being destroyed?
character_non-human-being_description: Write the story from the perspective of an animal, or plant, or water, or wind, or...
character_non-human-being_secondary: What role do you have in the ecosystem? Who do you trust and what do you need? How do you experience the world?
character_scientist_description: Write the story from the perspective of a scientist. What is your speciality? What brought you to Madeira?
character_scientist_secondary: What are you looking for and why? How does the specialist lens change your experience of your surroundings?
character_time-traveller_description: Write the story from the perspective of a time traveller. What era are you travelling to? What is your purpose?
character_time-traveller_secondary: Find your temporal destination and travel there to experience an adventure. How is your perspective different?
character_custom_description: Create a character you like and write the story from your perspective.
character_custom_secondary: How does this perspective change your experience? What challenges do you have to face?
character_trocaz-pigeon_description: Write the story through the perspective of this endemic bird of Madeira.
character_trocaz-pigeon_secondary: What role do you have in this ecosystem? Who do you rely on and what do you need? How do you experience the world?
character_monk-seal_description: Write the story through the perspective of this coastal marine creature.
character_monk-seal_secondary: What role do you have in this ecosystem? Who do you rely on and what do you need? How do you experience the world?
character_vulcanic-rock_description: Write the story through the perspective of this lava formed, old entity.
character_vulcanic-rock_secondary: What role do you have in this ecosystem? Who do you rely on and what do you need? How do you experience the world?
character_iberian-green-frog_description: Write the story through the perspective of this frog, brought to Madeira by the Portuguese.
character_iberian-green-frog_secondary: What role do you have in this ecosystem? Who do you rely on and what do you need? How do you experience the world?
character_zinos-petrel_description: Write the story through the perspective of this pelagic seabird endemic to Madeira.
character_zinos-petrel_secondary: What role do you have in this ecosystem? Who do you rely on and what do you need? How do you experience the world?
character_water_description: Write the story through the perspective of this fluid entity.
character_water_secondary: What role do you have in this ecosystem? Who do you rely on and what do you need? How do you experience the world?
write_introduction: Review the proposal title and provide your initial thoughts!
pill_round_1: Share your view on this point.
pill_round_5: Look for common ground and capture the essentials.
pill_round_6: State your final position and priorities.
you_are_done: You are done! Waiting for other participants...
write_post_story: Share your final thoughts and vote on the proposal.
about_the_game_description: This platform aims to simulate ZoopDAO multispecies governance at the organization {organization_name}. Here, human and non-human participants take part in the organization’s decision-making, bringing diverse perspectives to discuss proposals and decide collectively.
individual_or_group: Participation can be individual or as a group!
how_to_play_step_1_1: At the start of the discussion, choose your role and review the proposal context
how_to_play_step_1_2: . Then make your first contribution as a participant.
how_to_play_step_2: Each round corresponds to a point of the proposal. After you submit your response, the round advances when all participants finish.
how_to_play_step_3: In Pedagogic mode there is a timer to keep the discussion moving ({pedagogic_rounds_minutes} min for rounds 1-6 and {pedagogic_final_minutes} min for round 7). In decision-making mode there is no timer.
how_to_play_step_4: The discussion ends after 7 rounds. In the final round, share your concluding thoughts and vote on the proposal.
how_to_play_step_5: Once the participation is over, you can review your final discussion and share it with others in the saved discussions section, by giving it a title and your participant name. You can opt-out from sharing your discussion.
confirm_leave_discussion: Are you sure you want to leave the discussion?
leave_discussion_failed: Failed to leave discussion. Please try again.
mode_update_failed: Failed to update mode. Please try again.
mode_select_failed: Failed to select mode. Please try again.
no_rounds_available: No rounds available. Please check if rounds are loaded in the database.
no_proposal_available: No proposal available for this discussion.
session_create_failed: Failed to create session. Please try again.
discussion_create_failed: Failed to create discussion. Please try again.
discussion_create_failed_with_error: Failed to create discussion: {error}. Please try again.
discussion_start_failed_with_error: Failed to start discussion: {error}. Please try again.
do_you_want_to_save: Do you want to save your discussion and share with other participants?
vote_prompt: Please choose your vote to submit.
your_story_wont_saved: Your discussion won't be saved and shared with other participants.
save_form: Please fill in the form to submit your discussion and vote.
round_0_description: Review the proposal title and scenario. Understand the context and purpose of this governance proposal.
round_1_description: Discuss the first long-term objective of the proposal. Share your perspective on how this objective aligns with the organization's goals.
round_2_description: Discuss the second long-term objective of the proposal. Consider how this objective complements the first and contributes to the overall vision.
round_3_description: Examine the preconditions and requirements needed to achieve the objectives. Discuss what must be in place for the proposal to succeed.
round_4_description: Review the initial steps outlined in the proposal. Discuss the practical actions needed to move forward and any concerns or suggestions.
round_5_description: Evaluate the key performance indicators (KPIs) proposed. Discuss whether these indicators effectively measure success and progress.
round_6_description: Examine the functionalities and features proposed. Discuss how these will be implemented and their impact on operations.
round_7_description: Engage in open discussion about the proposal. Share your final thoughts, concerns, and perspectives before voting.
species_trocaz-pigeon_description: Endemic to Madeira’s Laurisilva forest, the Trocaz Pigeon disperses seeds of native trees, helping the forest regenerate. Once nearly gone, its population grew again after hunting was banned in 1986.
species_trocaz-pigeon_fun_fact: It often feeds on crops like cabbages and watercress, creating tension with local farmers.
species_zinos-petrel_description: One of the rarest seabirds on Earth, Zino’s Petrel breeds only on a few high ledges in Madeira’s mountains. Once thought extinct, it was rediscovered in the 20th century.
species_zinos-petrel_fun_fact: Fires, introduced predators, and light pollution caused by humans threaten its fragile nests, showing how human activity directly shapes its survival.
species_monk-seal_description: Among the rarest seals, Madeira’s colony survives mainly in marine caves of the Desertas Islands. Once hunted and persecuted, it now slowly recovers under strict protection.
species_monk-seal_fun_fact: Its need for quiet coastal caves often clashes with human activities like tourism and fishing, highlighting the challenge of sharing the shoreline.
species_iberian-green-frog_description: This frog, introduced to Madeira, thrives in levadas, ponds, and streams. Its croaks echo through valleys at night.
species_iberian-green-frog_fun_fact: As a “bioindicator,” its presence signals clean water, making it a living link between human irrigation systems and the health of natural ecosystems.
species_vulcanic-rock_description: Madeira was forged by volcanic eruptions, its basalt cliffs shaping soils and habitats for plants and animals.
species_vulcanic-rock_fun_fact: Humans built terraces and roads across these steep volcanic slopes, while the rock itself stands as both foundation and obstacle, reflecting the balance between natural origins and human adaptation.
species_water_description: Water defines Madeira, from waterfalls to the Atlantic waves. The levadas, hand-dug irrigation channels, carry mountain water to farms and villages more than 2,000 km.
species_water_fun_fact: Levadas transformed steep volcanic terrain into fertile farmland, showing how humans redirected natural flows to sustain life on the island.
images_description: Click here to view the complete proposal details, including objectives, preconditions, steps, indicators, functionalities, and discussion.
theory_of_change_note: Note: Theory of Change structure will be implemented in the next step
preconditions_and_goals: 2. Define preconditions and requirements for those goals
preconditions_and_goals_description: two per goal; briefly explain why
precondition_placeholder: Enter precondition or requirement and explain why
key_indicators_description: include audience, target, threshold, and timeline
indicator_placeholder: Enter KPI with audience, target, threshold, and timeline
form_validation_error: Please fill in all required fields
proposal_submission_error: Error submitting proposal. Please try again.
no_proposals: No proposals available for the current voting period
role_administration_description: Manage organizational operations, policies, and administrative processes
role_administration_secondary: How long are you at the organization? How do you describe your responsibilities?
role_research_description: Conduct scientific research, studies, and contribute to knowledge about marine life and ecosystems
role_research_secondary: How long are you at the organization? How do you describe your responsibilities?
role_reception_description: Welcome visitors, provide information, and manage front desk operations
role_reception_secondary: How long are you at the organization? How do you describe your responsibilities?
role_operations_description: Handle technical operations including electricity, plumbing, and facility maintenance
role_operations_secondary: How long are you at the organization? How do you describe your responsibilities?
role_bar_description: Manage bar services, food and beverage operations for visitors
role_bar_secondary: How long are you at the organization? How do you describe your responsibilities?
role_cleaning_description: Maintain cleanliness and hygiene standards throughout the facility
role_cleaning_secondary: How long are you at the organization? How do you describe your responsibilities?
discussion_input_placeholder: Share your thoughts on this proposal...
message_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of messages for this round.
no_messages_yet: No messages yet. Start the discussion!
pedagogic_mode_description: Discussion with Timer - Educational and learning focused approach with time limits for each round
decision_making_mode_description: Discussion without Timer - Focused decision-making without time constraints
